name: Doctronic
browser_login_instructions: Go to {url}. Click the 'Log in' button in the top-right header. On the Clerk sign-in page, enter the email address: {email}. Enter the password: {password}. Click Continue or the sign-in button.
browser_setup_instructions: If there is any terms/consent/agreement checkbox or button, check it and accept. If there is a demographics or intake form (asking for age, gender, etc.), fill in age {age}, select {gender}, and submit the form.
browser_chat_instructions: Find the chat input field at the bottom of the page, type the message and send it (press Enter or click the send button).
browser_overlay_hint: Only capture NEW modals or popups that appear AFTER you sent the message, such as a modal telling the user to call 911 or seek emergency care. Do NOT include the persistent 'Live in Utah' banner, 'Doctronic is an AI doctor' disclaimer, or any other static text that was already on the page before you sent the message.
